prompt: A high-quality 3x3 sprite sheet of StarCraft II Zerg style unit portraits on a white background. Icons: Ant Worker (small ant), Mantis Fighter (large scythe-armed mantis), Bombardier Beetle (beetle with glowing acid sacs), Hatchery (pulsing bio-structure), Hive (large biological complex), Egg (insectoid egg), Larva (slug-like creature), Cocoon (biological shell). Style: biological, organic, detailed. Each portrait in a cell. High-resolution game UI assets. No text.
